title: BRAIN CAST: processing pipeline for children's age- and sex-specific pediatric brain MRI templates
description:
Reproducible pipeline that builds the BRAIN CAST pediatric brain MRI template library (28 age- and sex-specific T1-weighted templates, ages 5–18) from the Healthy Brain Network (HBN), together with the validation suite used to evaluate it.

Contents: a ten-step constraint-aware preprocessing stream (SLURM/Apptainer), the ANTs antsMultivariateTemplateConstruction2.sh driver plus the exact as-run per-stratum scripts, the downstream-fidelity validation suite, figure-generation scripts, and a license-free container build in which CAT12 SANLM is replaced by ANTs DenoiseImage so the pipeline runs without a MATLAB license.

Code only — no MRI data and no subject identifiers are included. HBN data are distributed by the Child Mind Institute through INDI under their data-use terms and are not redistributed here. BRAIN CAST is derived from HBN and is not a Child Mind Institute product.

Companion to the BRAIN CAST Data Descriptor (Scientific Data, in review) and the companion methods manuscript.
